title: ARTICA® — ID :: Behance

bodyText: PULAR PARA O CONTEÚDO PRINCIPAL PULAR PARA O RODAPÉ Acesse behance.net Explorar Carreiras Recursos Contratar Experimente grátis Fazer logon Acesse adobe.com Seguir Ferramentas Salvar Curtir ARTICA® — ID Vários propriet. • Seguir tudo A Movement in Motion ARTICA is not just streetwear. It’s the silence before the storm, the chill before the fire. Born in Germany and designed for the bold, ARTICA is for those who wear their identity like armor. The rebels, the creatives, the leaders of the next wave. At its core, ARTICA is a movement. A visual language of identity, unity, and expression. Every design is intentional. Every drop carries a message. Because no one remembers ordinary. They remember what hits different. What drips with meaning. What walks in like it owns the block. The Symbol: Unity in Motion The ARTICA symbol is created by repeating the letter A in a circular formation. This shape reflects more than the brand name. It stands for: * Unity — people from different backgrounds coming together. * Connection — each A points outward but stays connected at the center. * Forward movement — a cycle of energy, growth, and purpose. This symbol represents all of us. Different stories with one goal. Not just for this generation, but for the next. It is more than a logo. It is the visual core of the collective mindset behind ARTICA. The Color Palette: Cold, Bold, Electric The ARTICA color palette is built around contrast and intensity. It blends deep blacks, icy greys, and sharp whites with a signature blue neon accent. This mix creates a mood that is both minimal and striking, cool and confrontational. Blue neon is the pulse of the brand. It cuts through the neutral base like a signal in the dark. Blue speaks to clarity, trust, and depth, while the neon quality adds energy, tension, and modern edge. It evokes the cold calm before impact, precise, focused, and emotionally charged. This palette was chosen to reflect the ARTICA mindset: bold in silence, sharp in presence, and unapologetically forward. It’s made to stand out in the streetwear world, but more importantly, to say something without shouting. ​​​​​​​ YUMÉ CREATIVE STUDIO © 2025 — All signal received Waves instagram | linkedin Reach hello@yume-creativestudio.com Mainframe www.yume-creativestudio.com ARTICA® — ID 1,6 mil 17,2 mil 187 Publicado em: 7 de julho de 2025 Vários propriet.
